485:     pub async fn handle_socket(self: Arc<Self>, mut socket: axum::extract::ws::WebSocket, addr: SocketAddr, path: String, ws_protocol: String) {
486:         use axum::extract::ws::Message;
487: 
488:         while let Some(Ok(msg)) = socket.recv().await {
489:             let text = match msg {
490:                 Message::Text(t) => t,
491:                 Message::Close(_) => break,
492:                 _ => continue,
493:             };
494: 
495:             let mut task = Task::new(1);
496:             {
497:                 let mut w = task.state.write();
498:                 w.fields.insert("request.protocol".to_string(), ox_workflow_core::state::FieldValue::String(ws_protocol.clone()));
499:                 w.fields.insert("request.method".to_string(), ox_workflow_core::state::FieldValue::String("GET".to_string()));
500:                 w.fields.insert("request.path".to_string(), ox_workflow_core::state::FieldValue::String(format!("/{}", path)));
501:                 w.fields.insert("request.query".to_string(), ox_workflow_core::state::FieldValue::String(String::new()));
502:                 w.fields.insert("request.source_ip".to_string(), ox_workflow_core::state::FieldValue::String(addr.ip().to_string()));
503:                 w.fields.insert("request.header.accept".to_string(), ox_workflow_core::state::FieldValue::String("application/json".to_string()));
504:                 w.fields.insert("request.body".to_string(), ox_workflow_core::state::FieldValue::String(text));
505:                 w.fields.insert("response.status".to_string(), ox_workflow_core::state::FieldValue::String("500".to_string()));
506:                 w.fields.insert("response.body".to_string(), ox_workflow_core::state::FieldValue::String(String::new()));
507:             }

509:             let permit = Arc::clone(&self.plugin_semaphore).acquire_owned().await
510:                 .unwrap_or_else(|_| panic!("plugin semaphore closed"));

512:             let flow = Arc::clone(&self);

514:                 let _permit = permit;
